tldr: Closing stage of Itzulia 2026 with Seixas defending the overall. Limited podium detail in current public coverage; the week's headline — Seixas as a 19-year-old WorldTour stage race winner — was already in the bank.

narrative.headline: Closing day formality
narrative.body: Defensive ride for Seixas and Decathlon, GC sealed on Stage 5.

gcImpact.headline: Itzulia 2026 — Paul Seixas
gcImpact.body: Final overall: Seixas, ahead of Lipowitz and the rest by 1:23+. Three stage wins, leader's jersey from Stage 1.
